description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the inovex/gitlab-ci-android:25 Docker image, setting GRADLE_OPTS to -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false and defining a cache keyed by ${CI_PROJECT_ID} that stores the .gradle/ directory. Include a before_script that sets GRADLE_USER_HOME to the local .gradle folder, makes gradlew executable, and synchronizes and updates all git submodules recursively. Define a single build stage containing four jobs: assembleDebug runs ./gradlew assembleDebug and uploads app/build/outputs/ as an artifact; assembleRelease runs ./gradlew assembleRelease and uploads app/build/outputs/ as an artifact; lintDebug runs ./gradlew -Pci --console=plain lintDebug -PbuildDir=lint; and spotlessCheck runs ./gradlew spotlessCheck. All jobs inherit the before_script and cache.
